payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown, high-gloss carved wooden dining chair showing an ornate scrolled arm/leg and a small portion of a dark upholstered seat; chair appears well-finished and is approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
